untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection requires visual/structural analysis (failed breakout, EADB confirmation) which cannot be expressed with available indicators. 'Stock fails to climb after pattern setup' and 'Pattern fails to achieve expected breakout direction' lack objective price/indicator thresholds. Exit conditions completely marked AUTHOR_SILENT with no target computation provided.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses strong downward reversal (close below prev_close with large body) as proxy for 'gusto' reversal and exit on mean-reversion above SMA_20. However, the core EADB pattern detection and busted confirmation logic cannot be reliably translated to numeric conditions. Success rates (29% bull, 15% bear) indicate low pattern reliability. Original source appears incomplete (text cut off). Recommend manual pattern validation or candlestick pattern library integration.
